content.en:
The ultimate extremity?

Bluffing really wants to say that it is impossible for him to reach the realm of the ultimate supreme in his life, Ye Tian thinks too highly of him!

However, Ye Tian didn't want to talk nonsense and went straight to it.

Rumble!!!

Bluff's body was directly bombarded, and after being killed, the energy of the whole body was absorbed by the ultimate place and disappeared without a trace.

Killing and bluffing is just a matter of handiness for Ye Tian.

At the beginning, he wanted to kill Bluff, but as a result, Bluff escaped to the ultimate place, and now that he has met Bluff, how could he let him go!

Unconsciously.

Some ~ Ultimate Era years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian heard a piece of information, that is, another Eternal Rank Ultimate-Realm Lord had fallen.

"Gradually, an Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord has fallen, and this Ultimate Tribulation is really terrifying-ah!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He suspected that the ultimate tribulation had already begun, and the fall of the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord was a sign, even if those Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords continued to pit and kill those Ancient and Hao Ultimate Realm Lords, it still wouldn't work.

The Ultimate Tribulation still can't be stopped, maybe it's because there are too many Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lords in the Ultimate Land, and for countless years, the Ancient Level Ultimate Realm Masters have tried to avoid the Ultimate Tribulation, resulting in the number of Ancient Level Ultimate Realm Masters has exceeded the standard.

Therefore, this ultimate tribulation is aimed at the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord, and he wants to let the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord fall.

Perhaps some Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters also realized it, so they wanted to trap and kill other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, so that they would not lead the calamity to themselves, and they could survive this ultimate tribulation.

......

"Damn, several Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords want to besiege me!!!"

The White Ghost Extreme Venerable was on the run, his strength was average among the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, and he had also offended a lot of Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords.

Now, those Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters besieged and killed him, causing him to use a special treasure, and only then did he escape with his life.

In the days that followed, he hid somewhere in the Ultimate Land, not daring to come out again, lest he be besieged and killed by other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords again.

However.

He hadn't been hiding for long before he was found by an Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord who was good at tracking.

Bang!!!!

The two Immortal-level Ultimate Realm masters fought each other, causing this area to shatter and many creatures to fall, and one of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies hidden in this area was naturally affected.

"White Ghost Extreme Venerable!"

"Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable!"

"These two are dead!"

Lin Tian naturally hoped that the White Ghost Extreme Venerable would be killed, after all, he was arrested by the White Ghost Extreme Venerable, although because of the White Ghost Extreme Venerable, he had the opportunity to break through to the ancient level Ultimate Realm Master Realm.

But he still wants to kill the White Ghost Jizun, after all, this guy is an enemy!

But his strength was still far from the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Master, so he could only hide and watch the battle from afar.

After a while, the two Eternal Ultimate Realm Masters fell into a white-hot life-and-death struggle, and the strength of the White Ghost Extreme Venerable was not as good as the White Ghost Extreme Venerable, plus the White Ghost Ultimate Venerable's injuries had not recovered well, so they were naturally crushed.

Soon, the White Ghost Extreme Honor's Perfect Ultimate Body was broken, and his whole body was cracked.

If this battle continues, the White Ghost Extreme Venerable is afraid that he will fall.

"Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable, if you let me go, I swear I will never deal with you. I can compensate you for your losses, how?" said the White Ghost Extreme Venerable.

Tianyin Jizun said coldly: "White Ghost Jizun, you are a guy who will be revenged, if I let you go, you will definitely retaliate in the future, I don't want to leave an enemy for myself!"

Rumble!!!!

The Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable continued to attack the White Ghost Extreme Venerable, and the White Ghost Extreme Venerable's body continued to shatter, blood spilled into the void, and there was no time to recover his body.

"Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable, do you really want to die with me?"

The White Ghost roared.

"Hahaha, all of you will be killed, just by virtue of the end of the crossbow?"

Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable sneered.

But at this moment, the White Ghost Extreme Venerable took out a treasure and asked the Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable to stop moving.

It was a bead, but it contained terrifying power inside.

"This is the ultimate thing left by Lei Yan Jizun, but it can kill the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord with one blow, if you want to find death, I will immediately urge this treasure!" said the White Ghost Jizun.

This treasure is indeed terrifying, but the coverage is too large, once sacrificed, even he may not be able to escape, so it cannot be stimulated casually.

The Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable hesitated, he was a little unsure if this was true, but the Lei Yan Extreme Venerable aura contained was real.

Lei Yan Extreme Venerable is the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, the items he left behind, there is indeed no problem in killing the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord, if it is true, he may not be able to survive.

He pondered for a while, and said coldly: "White Ghost Extreme Venerable, you have made the ultimate oath, and if you are not allowed to target me and my family, I will let you go." "

"Good!"

The White Ghost has made an oath.

When the oath was made, the Heavenly Seal Supreme Venerable shuttled away.

Obviously, he didn't dare to bet.

Seeing the Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable leaving, the White Ghost Extreme Venerable breathed a sigh of relief, and prepared to leave here to prevent other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters from chasing and killing him.

And at this very moment.

Ye Tian attacked.

"The Ultimate Arcane - Tearing the Heavens!"

Burst!!!!

The body of the White Ghost Jizun was torn into two pieces, but it did not fall, but merged again, but the body was already heavily damaged.

"Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord!"

The White Ghost Extreme Venerable was a little incredulous, he was actually severely injured by an ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord.

"That was the ultimate arcane !! just now"

"You, an ancient level Ultimate Realm Master, can actually know the ultimate arcane!"

The White Ghost Extreme Venerable is unbelievable.

And he found that Ye Tian was a little familiar, and quickly remembered, this is not one of the high-level Ultimate Realm Masters who was thrown into the Polar Sun Land by him, and now he has not only broken through to become an Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Master, but also mastered the ultimate arcane, which is really a bit demonic!

Ye Tianke did not hesitate and continued to attack the White Ghost Extreme Venerable.

Thundered!!!

The two sides were fighting.

It stands to reason that even if the White Ghost Extreme Venerable is seriously injured, he can still beat Ye Tian, but he was torn by Ye Tian and attacked, this is the ultimate arcane, and the injuries caused are difficult to heal at all.

At this moment, the combat power of the White Ghost Extreme Venerable has declined seriously, and it is difficult to kill Ye Tian.
